items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】GG Super Mini Shoulder Bag. The initials of founder Guccio Gucci add a touch of elegance to leather goods, blending modern small leather goods with Gucci's rich design heritage. The richly textured and glossy classic GG pattern adds a unique touch to this elegant pale green mini shoulder bag. Pale green GG leather, cotton-linen blend lining, inside: one leather open pocket, adjustable shoulder strap (50cm high) magnetic snap closure.
items.name_cn:
💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】GG Super Mini Shoulder Bag. The initials of founder Guccio Gucci add a touch of elegance to leather goods, blending modern small leather goods with Gucci's rich design heritage. The richly textured and glossy classic GG pattern adds a unique touch to this elegant pale green mini shoulder bag. Pale green GG leather, cotton-linen blend lining, inside: one leather open pocket, adjustable shoulder strap (50cm high) magnetic snap closure.
Model: 772794.
Dimensions: 13.5(L) x 21(W) x 3cm(D)
Color: Pale green/embossed original leather.
Weight: approx. 0.34kg
Italian creation
Fits iPhone Pro Max/Plus, small wallet, and lipstick

items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】Gucci Bamboo 1947 series mini bamboo handbag. The Gucci Bamboo 1947 series handbags ingeniously incorporate unique designs such as handcrafted bamboo handles, buckles, and mirrors (encased in leather), showcasing the brand's classic style and exquisite craftsmanship. Visit designated stores or experience exclusive selection with the assistance of a client advisor. Red patent leather, gold-tone bamboo hardware, leather lining, interior: card pocket, web strap length: 81-125cm; leather strap length: 100-114cm, handle height: 8cm, web strap height: 41-64cm; leather strap height: 50-57cm, bamboo buckle closure, weight: approx. 0.445kg.

items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】Gucci Luce series mini shoulder bag. The Gucci Luce collection exudes a playful and fun vibe, with "Luce" meaning "Light" in Italian. Original GG canvas infuses this elegant mini shoulder bag with design essence. Blue leather trim and light gold-tone hardware complement the beige and ebony pattern. An adjustable brown leather shoulder strap adds functionality. Beige and ebony classic GG canvas, blue leather, light gold-tone metal hardware, cotton-linen blend lining, Gucci monogram zipper pull, interior: one flat pocket, adjustable shoulder strap (20cm high), twist lock closure, weight: approx. 0.25kg.

items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】Mini Bucket Shoulder Bag. This mini bucket shoulder bag is crafted from brown leather. This accessory features a hook closure, with a webbed shoulder strap design, cleverly blending functionality and modernity. Brown leather, light gold-tone metal hardware, red and green webbed shoulder strap, cotton-linen blend lining, zip pocket, with Gucci logo zip pull, shoulder strap (42cm high) hook closure.

items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】The GG Milano handbag, created by Brand Creative Director Sabato De Sarno, debuted at the 2024 Fall/Winter Fashion Week, paying tribute to Milan, the city that inspired the design. This shoulder bag features a new double-G motif, crafted from soft and smooth GG embossed fluffy leather. The chain strap adds styling versatility, easily creating a crossbody look.
items.name_cn:
💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】The GG Milano handbag, created by Brand Creative Director Sabato De Sarno, debuted at the 2024 Fall/Winter Fashion Week, paying tribute to Milan, the city that inspired the design. This shoulder bag features a new double-G motif, crafted from soft and smooth GG embossed fluffy leather. The chain strap adds styling versatility, easily creating a crossbody look.
Fluffy leather
Glossy light gold-tone hardware
Leather lining
Double-G
D-ring buckle
One zip pocket with GG charm, one open pocket, and one lipstick organizer
Handle height 6.1 cm
Removable chain shoulder strap (approx. 50 cm)
Spring clip
Weight: approx. 0.5 kg
Model: 806017
Dimensions: 21(L) x 12.5(W) x 4.6(H)
Color: Wine red embossed leather / Original leather
Italian creation

items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖GG Denim fabric is a classic material widely used in the brand's handbag and apparel series. In the Gucci Insignia fashion collection, this high-recognizability classic jacquard fabric returns, using a full-body layout design to inject rich details into many classic luggage pieces. Brown leather trim adds charm to this backpack. For more details. Black and ivory white GG jacquard denim fabric, black leather trim, gold-tone hardware.

items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖GG Detail Zip Wallet. Gucci small leather goods push design boundaries, constantly reinterpreting classic pieces in a personalized way. This men's wallet combines classic GG Supreme canvas with black GG hardware to create a refined accessory for modern fashion. Black leather trim, embossed fabric lining with GG details, inside: 12 card slots, 3 bill compartments.

items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖GG fabric is a classic material widely used in the brand's handbag and apparel series. In the Gucci Insignia fashion collection, this high-recognizability classic jacquard fabric returns, using a full-body layout design to inject rich details into many classic luggage pieces. Brown leather trim adds charm to this backpack. For more details. Beige and ivory white GG jacquard fabric, beige leather trim, gold-tone hardware.

items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖GG MARMONT MATLASS mini bucket bag style. Inspired by the natural earth tones, Gucci's enduring design continues to present new iterations season after season. For the 2023 Spring/Summer collection, sage green enriches the latest leather selections, a timeless color that stands the test of time. Here, it enriches a signature GG Marmont mini bucket bag with gold double-G hardware. Sage green Matlass chevron leather, gold hardware, cloud print and microfiber lining, suede-like surface, detachable double-G charm, 2 card slots, chain strap, drop 23.6 inches, drawstring closure, also wearable as a crossbody bag.

items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖Gucci Attache Small Shoulder Bag. The charm of GG Crystal Canvas interprets the 2023 Fall/Winter Men's Accessories collection, with a glossy surface and durable properties injecting contemporary style into the brand's classic design. This small shoulder bag features a recognizable crescent shape, and the G-hook buckle adds design aesthetics. Classic hardware combined with soft materials interprets vintage charm in a beautiful and romantic way. Black GG Crystal Canvas, palladium-tone hardware, red and blue striped webbing, also comes with a leather shoulder strap, detachable webbing shoulder strap (45cm high) G-hook with zipper.

items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖Gucci Blondie Mini Bucket Bag. The Gucci Blondie series features a bold pattern paired with leather in matching tones, exuding a subtle and restrained atmosphere throughout. The series ingeniously incorporates circular geometric interlocking double G, showcasing Gucci's modern aesthetic design. Brand logo details add a unique charm to this black leather mini bucket bag adorned with tassel details. Black leather, taffeta lining, circular interlocking double G leather patch, leather tassel, top handle (8cm high), detachable chain shoulder strap (55cm high), drawstring closure.

items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖Gucci Horsebit 1955 Small Shoulder Bag. To celebrate the 70th anniversary of the classic horsebit element, the new series reinterprets the horsebit element, cleverly incorporating a dazzling crystal outer ring. This small shoulder bag is crafted from light green leather, featuring elegant and charming new elements such as crystal horsebit details, exuding a modern temperament. Light green leather, gold-tone crystal accessories, cotton-linen blend lining, horsebit detail on front, top handle, detachable leather shoulder strap (20cm high); detachable chain shoulder strap with interlocking double G (52cm high) Weight: approx. 0.7kg.

items.name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖Intro: The new Beloved fashion collection tells moving stories with color. Supreme is a representative fabric of the brand, inspired by 1930s archival designs. The classic brown and ebony design, reinterpreted, conveys the brand's enduring design essence. This pattern also becomes a signature highlight on this Ophidia series mini shoulder bag. Material features boutique-quality PVC with high-density webbing and high-end smooth vintage bronze hardware.
